accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text and accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; cites correct Federal Register citation and date.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as nullifying the WOTUS rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: States the rule shall have no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions in this resolution.

effective_dates.why: No effective date or sunset specified.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the resolution's sole operative effect.

concise.why: Appropriately brief for a simple resolution.

correct_entities.why: Agencies named correctly match the bill text.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation and date are correct.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
